text: Immediately after a class "B" fire has been extinguished by the use of foam, crewmen should:

options.text: A) Carefully apply a low velocity fog over the foam blanket
B) Wade through the foam blanket to evenly distribute the foam
C) Be careful not to disturb the foam blanket
D) Sweep the foam blanket overboard and secure firefighting equipment

explanation: Disturbing the foam blanket allows oxygen to reach the fuel, potentially causing the fire to reignite. The blanket must remain intact until the area is confirmed safe.
